text:
The goal is at a bearing of -160 degrees. My current yaw is 0 degrees. To face the goal, I need to turn significantly to the left (since -160 is equivalent to +200 degrees, or simply 160 degrees counter-clockwise). A single TURN_LEFT action rotates me 30 degrees. I will start by turning left to align my heading with the goal.
